evidence.description: Weekly 'Wednesday Meetings' sessions brought together future reformists around Soroush's ideas, including Saeed Hajjarian, Akbar Ganji, and Emadeddin Baghi

evidence.source_title: Abdolkarim Soroush, the Great Reformer — Reset DOC
evidence.description: Hajjarian was part of the Kian circle and the broader Soroush intellectual network that formed the backbone of the reform movement

editorial_notes: Part of the Kian circle and the Wednesday Meetings that produced the reformist movement.
